description:
he modern 1 kanal house in DHA Phase 7 was designed to reflect elegance, functionality, and premium living standards. Real Enterprises developed this project with a contemporary architectural style, combining clean lines, spacious interiors, and high-end finishes throughout the home.

The residence features large bedrooms with attached bathrooms, a modern kitchen, open living and dining spaces, stylish ceilings, and premium flooring. Floor-to-ceiling windows were incorporated to maximize natural light and create a bright, open atmosphere across the house.

Special focus was placed on exterior elevation, landscaping, lighting, and smart use of space to ensure the property delivers both luxury and practicality. Every detail, from structural work to final finishing, was completed with precision and attention to quality.

This house stands as another example of Real Enterprises’ expertise in delivering modern homes in premium communities like DHA Phase 7.
